channel.title: benchmark on SBMARUF
channel.description: Recent content in benchmark on SBMARUF

item.title: ZeroSumEval: An Extensible Framework for Scaling LLM Evaluation with Inter-Model Competition
item.description: An extensible framework for scaling LLM evaluation through inter-model competition.

item.title: Humanity's Last Exam
item.description: A large-scale collaborative benchmark designed to test the limits of frontier AI systems.

item.title: When Benchmarks are Targets: Revealing the Sensitivity of Large Language Model Leaderboards
item.description: Revealing the sensitivity of LLM leaderboards to evaluation choices, showing that rankings can shift significantly with minor methodological changes.
